debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst✝ : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v : V
p : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G u v
⊢ ∑ e, @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeCount V inst✝ G u v p ↑e = @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.length V G u v p

proof:
suffices h : ∀ (u v : V) (p : G.LoopWalk u v), p.edges.length = p.length from by
    have hec : ∀ (e : Sym2 V), edgeCount p e = List.count e p.edges := by
      intro e; simp only [edgeCount]; rw [List.count_eq_countP]; congr 1
    simp_rw [hec]
    trans (∑ e ∈ (edgeSet p), List.count e p.edges)
    · exact Finset.sum_coe_sort (edgeSet p) (fun e => List.count e p.edges)
    · simp only [edgeSet]
      rw [List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length, h]
  intro u v p
  simp only [edges, List.length_map]
  induction p with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons h q ih => simp [darts, length, ih]
  | loop q ih => simp [darts, length, ih]
successful_attempts:
suffices h : ∀ (u v : V) (p : G.LoopWalk u v), p.edges.length = p.length from by
    have hec : ∀ (e : Sym2 V), edgeCount p e = List.count e p.edges := by
      intro e; simp only [edgeCount]; rw [List.count_eq_countP]; congr 1
    simp_rw [hec]
    trans (∑ e ∈ (edgeSet p), List.count e p.edges)
    · exact Finset.sum_coe_sort (edgeSet p) (fun e => List.count e p.edges)
    · simp only [edgeSet]
      rw [List.sum_toFinset_count_eq_length, h]
  intro u v p
  simp only [edges, List.length_map]
  induction p with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons h q ih => simp [darts, length, ih]
  | loop q ih => simp [darts, length, ih]
